feedback.text: I'm in support of the Digital Fairness Act, especially with how predatory some coorporations have been in their design of digital products, as they aren't held to the same standard we hold a lot of physical goods, especially gambling. I hope, like many have already also expressed that this act will encompass digital video games, and that these digital products that we buy, are held to similar standards as the products we would physically buy. That is to say that they can't just take them away from us should seller wish so, nor put whatever addictive design that would increase consumer spending, into them. Digital media definetly could stand with some ethical guidelines that protects the consumers, and this seems like a really good step, I just hope it will include enough to where it can help protect people and their purchases.
